title: Increase FPS
description: This pack increases your fps and makes your gameplay smoother.
body: This pack focuses on rendering and pc usage on game to optimize your fps while playing.(It emerged while i was testing the mods on my low end pc and it worked very well. Approximately doubled my fps on avarage playing.) If you think some mods are not necessary or more mods is required adjust as you wish, its compatible with many mods.
